kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": true, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "D:\\Projetos(Desenvolvimento)\\BugBank-RobotFramework\\reports\\browser\\traces\\temp\\8859862d-b304-4fd8-868e-14391f77b9ed"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Context
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://bugbank.netlify.app
kw.doc: Open a new Page.
